case_title: MONIQUE FALSA VS. CHRISTOPHER SHEPHERD et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FALXA, MONIQUE INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA CASTRO HOTEL INC SERVED MAY-22-2007, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SHEPHERD, CHRISTOPHER
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR STAY OF EXECUTION, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES FILED BY DEFENDANT SHEPHERD, CHRISTOPHER

LAW AND MOTION 301, PARTIES JOINT MOTION TO VACATE THE JUDGMENT AND DISMISS WITH PREJUDICE IS GRANTED PER STIPULATION. MOVING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR 8189

EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR STAY OF EXECUTION AND MEMORANDUM OF P/A IN SUPPORT THEREOF; DECLARATION OF MICHAEL PIEJA IN SUPPORT OF DEFTS' EXPARTE APPLICATION FILED BY DEFENDANT SHEPHERD, CHRISTOPHER
FIRST FILING FEE PAID FILED BY DEFENDANT SHEPHERD, CHRISTOPHER

HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT CHRISTOPHER SHEPHERD'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT BEING UNABLE TO EXAMINE APPLICANT RULED ON THE APPLICATION SUBMITTED. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE APPLICANT'S INCOME IS ENOUGH TO PAY THE COMMON NECESSARIES OF LIFE AND COURT FEES AND COSTS. CHRISTOPHER SHEPHERD HAS TEN DAYS TO PAY THE FILING FEES OR THE FILINGS WILL BE STRICKEN. ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF FEE SENT TO ALL PARTIES. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON, II; CLERK: DLOK; REPORTER: SUSAN LEE CSR #4280 (206)
